name: serveless
description: Serverless Lambda behind ALB using LocalStack and Terraform

scripts.dev:up: npm run localstack:up && npm run localstack:health && npm run tf:init && npm run tf:apply
scripts.dev:deploy: npm run sls:print && npm run sls:deploy
scripts.dev:reset: npm run destroy:all && npm run dev:up
scripts.localstack:restart: npm run localstack:down && npm run localstack:up
scripts.localstack:reset: localstack stop && docker volume rm localstack_main || true && localstack start -d
scripts.remove:all: npm run sls:remove && npm run tf:destroy
scripts.remove:all:force: npm run sls:remove:force && npm run tf:destroy
scripts.destroy:local: npm run remove:all:force && npm run clean:runtime
scripts.destroy:all: npm run remove:all:force && npm run clean:all && npm run localstack:reset
scripts.clean:all: rm -rf .serverless node_modules package-lock.json terraform/.terraform terraform/.terraform.lock.hcl terraform/terraform.tfstate terraform/terraform.tfstate.backup
scripts.check: npm run tf:fmt && npm run tf:validate && npm run sls:print
